elements.original_description: A red circle with a diagonal line through it, symbolizing 'don't', on a pure white background.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon: a bold, bright red circle with a crisp white diagonal line running through it from top-left to bottom-right, symbolizing a 'don't' or prohibition sign, centered on a pure white background, rendered as clean flat vector art with sharp edges, high contrast, and no shading, gradients, or textures, isolated and clear.
